fixture: 062_exists_subquery

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE customers (id INTEGER NOT NULL, active INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO customers VALUES (1, 1)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO customers VALUES (2, 0)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customers WHERE id = 1)
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] true

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customers WHERE id = 3)
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] false

statement 6:
  sql:
    SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customers WHERE active = 0)
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] false

statement 7:
  sql:
    SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customers WHERE id = 3)
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] true
